Comfortable Accommodation: Gemini Lodge in Rotorua offers a 4-star chalet with family rooms, a fitness centre, and a spa and wellness centre. Guests enjoy free WiFi, a swimming pool with stunning views, and a hot tub.
Relaxing Facilities: The property features a fitness room, outdoor play area, and a children's playground. Additional amenities include a laundry service, barbecue facilities, and free on-site private parking.
Local Attractions: Located 13 km from Rotorua Regional Airport, Gemini Lodge is near attractions such as Skyline Rotorua (2.5 km), Paradise Valley Springs (11 km), and Waimangu Volcanic Valley (29 km). Activities include canoeing and hiking.
Guest Favorites: Guests appreciate the lakes, family-friendly environment, and spacious family rooms.
